definitions: n. 商品（尤指周边产品）

examples.text: Support my channel by using the link in the description down below to buy the game on Steam. Also, new merch available now in the store, including a mystery new character pin. I wonder who it could be? Ancient China.
examples.explanation: 通过使用描述下方的链接在Steam上购买游戏来支持我的频道。此外，商店现在有新品上架，包括一个神秘的新角色徽章。我想知道会是谁呢？中国古代。

reviewSessions.example_text: Support my channel by using the link in the description down below to buy the game on Steam. Also, new merch available now in the store, including a mystery new character pin. I wonder who it could be? Ancient China.

reviewSessions.feedback: 答案准确，抓住了 merch 表示“商品/周边产品”的意思。
matched_points: 与参考义“尤指周边产品”方向一致
